case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. CHARLES POWERS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY JURY TRIAL SET FOR APR-01-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION, U.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT POWERS, CHARLES KOOMAS, JOSEPH MICHAEL ASSIGNED TO REPRESENT PARTY FOR U. D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR APR-01-2008 VACATED. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM JIM MILLAR, CLERK MARIA OLOPERNES-PENA, NOT REPORTED (218/206).
DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT POWERS, CHARLES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POWERS, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 140 JONES STREET #404 SAN FRANCISCO CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-2008, LEASE FORFEITED, IN THE EVENT DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH THIS STIPULATED JUDGMENT, ESSENTIAL TERMS ARE STATED IN THE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-26-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT POWERS, CHARLES DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT POWERS, CHARLES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT POWERS, CHARLES ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT POWERS, CHARLES ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62)
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT POWERS, CHARLES ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR MAR-26-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM JIM MILLAR, CLERK MARIA OLOPERNES-PENA, NOT REPORTED (218/206).
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jim Millar, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
David Hasbrouck, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Co.
John P. Zanghi representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Charles Powers is present.
Joseph Koomas representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 140 Jones Street #404, San Francisco California.

This case settled, the trial date of April 1, 2008 is vacated.
